# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: user-service.example.com:8080

  - name: product-service
    url: product-service.example.com:8080

routes:
  - name: user-api
    paths:
      - /users
    service: user-service

  - name: product-api
    paths:
      - /products
    service: product-service

upstreams:
  - name: user-upstream
    targets:
      - user-service.example.com:8080

  - name: product-upstream
    targets:
      - product-service.example.com:8080

load_balancing:
  strategy: round-robin
